evals.prompt: Add login authentication to my Object UI app. I need a login page, route protection, and the user's role to control which dashboard cards are visible via schema expressions.
evals.expected_output: Provides AuthProvider setup, LoginForm usage, AuthGuard for routes, and pattern for injecting user role into SchemaRendererProvider dataSource for expression-based visibility.

evals.prompt: I need RBAC for my CRM: admins can do everything, sales reps can only edit their own contacts, and viewers are read-only. How do I set this up with Object UI permissions?
evals.expected_output: Provides PermissionProvider config with three roles, row-level permissions with owner filter, and usePermissions usage for conditional UI rendering.
